Footer.quote: Wines born from gravity and the silence of the Limarí Valley. A pure expression of our land.

Metadata.description: Author wines from Limarí Valley. A pure expression of our land.

our_winery.title: Our Winery
our_winery.p1: At Viña OchoTierras we work with the dedication of an artisan; people and their experiences play a central role in the creation of our wines, where a significant part of the process is done by hand.
our_winery.p2: The Viña OchoTierras winery was designed to produce quality wines. Built below ground level, it allows us to use gravity in part of the elaboration process, reducing the use of pumps and preserving the exceptional condition of the wines.

Tienda.title: Our Wines
Tienda.subtitle: Discover the unique expression of <italic>Limarí Valley</italic>. Wines with character, crafted with passion.

StoryScroll.title: Contact
StoryScroll.description: We are here to answer your questions about our wines, winery visits, or special sales.

Nosotros.title: Our History
Nosotros.subtitle: Viña Ochotierras is a limited production winery located in the heart of the Limarí Valley, whose history began in 1993 when we planted our first fine grape vineyards. Since then, we began our work as viticulturists, and since 2005, we have been crafting our own unique wines virtually by hand and under the highest oenological quality standards.
Nosotros.winery_text: We have a winery equipped with small tanks and designed to minimize the use of pumps. Combined with our demanding production process (hand-harvesting, selection, and manual pressing), this allows us to craft wines with character, transferring the essence of the terroir into every bottle.
Nosotros.strains: Our varieties are Chardonnay, Cabernet Sauvignon, Carmenere, and Syrah.

timeline.year_1993: Planting of the first fine grape vineyards.
timeline.year_2005: Birth of Viña Ochotierras' own wine production.

valley.title: Limarí Valley
valley.description_1: Located 400 km north of Santiago, in the Coquimbo Region. It is a semi-arid area with low rainfall (less than 100 mm per year), high luminosity, and mineral soils.
valley.description_2: Its climate is strongly influenced by the Pacific Ocean due to the presence of 'la Camanchaca,' a cold fog that creeps in from the West every morning into the valley and retreats at noon when one of the brightest skies in the world emerges. The combination of cold mornings, high luminosity, and mineral soils gives the wines a singular character of freshness, minerality, and elegance.

philosophy.title: Our Philosophy
philosophy.quote: "We believe in minimal intervention as the path to excellence."
philosophy.harvest_desc: Every bunch is selected and harvested by hand to ensure only the best fruit reaches the winery. We do not use machinery that could damage the grapes.
philosophy.gravity_desc: We minimize the use of pumps, moving the wine gently by gravity. This preserves natural aromas and tannins structure, delivering round and elegant wines.

Bodega.title: Winery &
Bodega.subtitle: Designed to respect the fruit and the environment.

terroir.location_desc: Our vineyards are planted 30 km from the coast, in front of the village of Limarí. Consisting of Syrah, Cabernet Sauvignon, Carmenère, Sauvignon Blanc, and Chardonnay varieties.
terroir.soils_desc: The training system of the vineyards is a simple trellis, on sandy loam soil in the bed of the Limarí River. The plantations are irrigated by a drip system, and the management of the vineyards is focused on obtaining quality grapes, reaching yields of 6,000 to 8,000 kg/ha.
terroir.quote: "Wine quality is born in the vineyard."

cellar.title: The Winery
cellar.description: The Viña OchoTierras winery was designed to produce quality wines. Built below ground level, it allows us to use gravity in part of the winemaking process, reducing the use of pumps and preserving the exceptional condition of the wines.
cellar.gravity_desc: We use the force of gravity to move our wines, avoiding pumps that oxygenate or mistreat the wine.
cellar.temp_desc: Being underground, we maintain a stable and cool natural temperature, ideal for aging our wines.
cellar.efficiency_desc: An efficient design that reduces energy consumption and minimizes our environmental impact.

Turismo.description: Immerse yourself in Limarí Valley. Tour our vineyards, learn about our gravitational process, and taste unforgettable wines.

tour.title: Tour & Tasting
tour.description: A complete experience designed for wine lovers. We start with a walk through our vineyards to understand the Limarí terroir, followed by a tour of our gravitational winery where you will learn the secrets of our production. We finish with a guided tasting of our Icon wines.
tour.include_2: Tasting of 3 wines (Reserve and Grand Reserve Line)
tour.note: * Minimum 2 people. Reservations 24 hours in advance.

Contacto.title: Contact
Contacto.subtitle: We are here to answer your questions.

info.title: Information
info.location_val:
Route D 505, km 11 from Ovalle.
Limarí Valley, Chile.

NuestrosVinos.description: Discover the unique expression of Limarí Valley in each of our lines.

reserva_especial.description: Our Special Reserve line brings together three wines of the Cabernet Sauvignon, Syrah and an assemblage (Cabernet Sauvignon / Syrah) varieties. This line of wines from Viña OchoTierras is unique and represents the essence of the Limarí Valley. Each wine is made with grapes coming from a single vineyard, which has been carefully studied to determine those sectors that will produce the grapes required to achieve the quality of our Special Reserve wines.

reserva_privada.description: Our Private Reserve wine line is composed of two varieties: Carmenere and Syrah. In its preparation, grapes from a single vineyard were used to be later aged in French oak for 10 to 12 months, resulting in wines of great character and silkiness that faithfully represent our terroir.

gran_reserva.description: Our best wines are selected each year after aging for 14 to 18 months in French oak barrels, with an annual production of around 17,000 bottles. It is an exclusive line and each vintage is a limited edition. Elegant, exquisite and complex wines. On their label we have printed the number of barrels used in the preparation, its finishing is done by hand, numbering each bottle and finishing the sealing with sealing wax.

chardonnay_reserva.description:
Harvesting and selection of the grapes are done manually, and throughout the entire winemaking process we take care of every detail so that our wines faithfully express the unique characteristics of this valley.

This Chardonnay is a wine of a soft golden color. On the nose, tropical fruit aromas and mineral notes typical of the Limarí Valley stand out. On the palate it is unctuous with balanced acidity and good body, making it an excellent reserve.
